<|channel|>analysis<|message|>We need to analyze the transcript to determine which player is likely a Werewolf. We have five players: Justin, Dan, Mitchell, Caitlynn, Mike. We need to deduce from the discussion who might be a werewolf. The transcript is messy; many lines are unclear. Let's parse.

We need to consider roles: possible roles include Werewolf, Minion, etc. But we only have five players; there are 8 roles total (players + 3). So there are 8 cards. We don't know which roles are present. But we can infer from the conversation.

We need to identify who might be a werewolf based on statements about switching, etc. The transcript seems to revolve around confusion about who switched cards. The mention of "Mike is a werewolf" appears at line 34: "Caitlynn: Mike's a werewolf." Then later, line 71: "Dan: I was actually the seer and Mike is a werewolf." So multiple people claim Mike is a werewolf. Also line 79: "Dan: Mike's the werewolf." So many claim Mike is werewolf. But also line 71 says "Mike is a werewolf." So likely Mike is the werewolf.

But let's examine other claims: "Justin: I can confirm that one of these three stories are true." Not helpful.

Also "Mike: I did." "Mike: I switched these two." So Mike might have swapped two cards. That could be the Robber or Troublemaker. But if Mike is a werewolf, he wouldn't be able to swap? Actually, a werewolf cannot swap; only certain roles can. But if Mike is a werewolf, he wouldn't have swapped. But the transcript indicates Mike swapped. So maybe Mike is not a werewolf. But the claims that Mike is a werewolf might be false.

Let's parse the transcript more systematically.

We have lines 1-7: Dan says "I'll make sure I..." (incomplete). Mitchell: "Fucking hell guys." Then the announcer gives instructions for the night. They talk about roles: Seer, Robber, Troublemaker, etc. So the night actions are happening. The players are presumably performing their night actions. The transcript shows confusion about who did what.

Line 7: "Mitchell: Where is it? There it is." Possibly referring to a card? Hard to interpret.

Line 8: Announcer: Everyone, wake up. So the night ends.

Then lines 9-10: Mitchell: Amen. Justin: Us three again, withholding information, huh? So they are discussing.

Line 11: Mitchell: It's always us three waiting to the end. Not clear.

Line 12: Caitlynn: It's because Dan and I don't get to play anything fun. Not helpful.

Line 13: Mitchell: Yeah, but you got to be careful. What if you got switched for a werewolf? So someone might have been swapped.

Line 14: Caitlynn: Might be. So suspect.

Line 15: Dan: Well, if you're honest right off the bat then. Not clear.

Line 16: Mitchell: No, but you might be a werewolf now. You might have been switched. So suspect.

Line 17: Dan: Right, no, no. For my logic though, you always put what you were right at the beginning out there if you don't care. Not clear.

Line 18: Caitlynn: And if someone wants to switch it... Do I care if anyone [inaudible 00:01:55] a villager? Not clear.

Line 19: Justin: What were you Mitchell? Not sure.

Line 20: Dan: Did somebody switch me? So Dan wonders if he was switched.

Line 21: Mitchell: It's quiet. Not helpful.

Line 22: Caitlynn: Did everybody switch Dan? Not sure.

Line 23: Mike: I revealed first when it was you and me first time so I would like you to reveal first this time. Not clear.

Line 24: Mitchell: I'm going to be brave. See, I am the third villager out there. So maybe he is a villager.

Line 25: Justin: It's not brave. Not helpful.

Line 26: Caitlynn: It's brave because it looks suspicious. Not helpful.

Line 27: Justin: I can confirm that one of these three stories are true. Not helpful.

Line 28: Mike: Wait, just one? Oh, I guess you only looked at one. So, were you a seer? So Mike asks if Justin was a seer.

Line 29: Mitchell: Or robber. So Mitchell says "Or robber."

Line 30: Justin: Seer or robber. So Justin says "Seer or robber."

Line 31: Mike: Seer or robber? So Mike repeats.

Line 32: Justin: Yes. So Justin says "Yes." Not helpful.

Line 33: Mitchell: And Mike, do you want to reveal any information? Not helpful.

Line 34: Caitlynn: Mike's a werewolf. So Caitlynn claims Mike is a werewolf.

Line 35: Mike: No. So Mike denies being a werewolf.

Line 36: Mitchell: Even a little bit? Not sure.

Line 37: Mike: No. I've always held off my troublemaker. Not helpful.

Line 38: Justin: Who did you switch? So Justin asks Mike.

Line 39: Mitchell: We might all be good again, maybe. Not helpful.

Line 40: Caitlynn: This round's far too suspicious. Not helpful.

Line 41: Dan: Now, are you actually a villager? Not helpful.

Line 42: Mitchell: Yes. So Mitchell says he is a villager.

Line 43: Dan: Are you sure? Not helpful.

Line 44: Mitchell: Yes. So repeated.

Line 45: Dan: Okay. So Dan says okay.

Line 46: Justin: Did you switch anybody? Not helpful.

Line 47: Mike: I did. So Mike says he did something.

Line 48: Justin: Who did you switch? So Justin asks.

Line 49: Mike: I switched these two. So Mike says he swapped two cards.

Line 50: Caitlynn: Woo. Not helpful.

Line 51: Justin: Okay. So Justin acknowledges.

Line 52: Mitchell: Now out of the three of us, myself included, we could have been a werewolf, looked at a card, saw a villager and claimed it. Not helpful.

Line 53: Justin: I can confirm that one of these two is a villager. Not helpful.

Line 54: Mike: And probably still a villager. Not helpful.

Line 55: Mitchell: Can anyone verify troublemaker? Not helpful.

Line 56: Dan: So are you a villager now, then? Not helpful.

Line 57: Justin: Yes. So Justin says yes.

Line 58: Dan: Okay. So Caitlynn and Justin were, Justin confirmed that Caitlynn was the villager. I think... Not helpful.

Line 59: Justin: I confirm that one of these two. Not helpful.

Line 60: Mike: Yeah. Not helpful.

Line 61: Dan: Oh. Not helpful.

Line 62: Mike: He switched. So it's not seer it's robber, and he switched with one of you two. Not helpful.

Line 63: Justin: Yeah. Not helpful.

Line 64: Mike: Yeah? That what you're saying? Okay. Not helpful.

Line 65: Caitlynn: There was hesitation in that voice, Justin. Not helpful.

Line 66: Justin: Well, just cause I was like, did I confirm that? But yes I did because I said, I am now a villager. I did. Yeah. Not helpful.

Line 67: Dan: And you switched us? Not helpful.

Line 68: Mike: I switched these two. So Mike says he swapped two.

Line 69: Dan: And you are a villager? Not helpful.

Line 70: Mitchell: I started as villager. So Mitchell says he started as villager.

Line 71: Dan: Okay. I was actually the seer and Mike is a werewolf. So Dan says he was the seer and Mike is a werewolf.

Line 72: Mitchell: Okay, so here we are. Not helpful.

Line 73: Mike: That's a big... Not helpful.

Line 74: Mitchell: Either of them can be a werewolf, and be playing this position that they're in. Not helpful.

Line 75: Mike: That was late coming to the game on that. Not helpful.

Line 76: Caitlynn: But I'll buy it. The look on his face. I'm willing to go for that. Not helpful.

Line 77: Mitchell: So Mike defend yourself now. Not helpful.

Line 78: Mike: I've already defended myself. I've switched these two. Not helpful.

Line 79: Dan: Mike's the werewolf. So Dan says Mike is the werewolf.

Line 80: Justin: Man... Not helpful.

Line 81: Dan: If what you did was... Not helpful.

Line 82: Mike: But here's what I'm getting from, he was waiting for Justin to not say he was the seer. I got my troublemaker from the beginning. Not helpful.

Line 83: Dan: Well, I was waiting to see one of these. Not helpful.

Line 84: Mike: No, no. Not helpful.

Line 85: Justin: Dan played, he was a snake in the grass and he was a good snake. You did good. He waited to see everyone else's story. Not helpful.

Line 86: Dan: I was trying to see if you were in fact the troublemaker, just to prove, so I'd have you being the robber and you being the troublemaker on my boat, that he is the werewolf and he's not the troublemaker, that he's lying. Not helpful.

Line 87: Caitlynn: You know what, if you lie to me, I'm going to be really mad. Dan did claim that you took my card because he knew he wasn't a villager. Not helpful.

Line 88: Dan: That's why I did that. Not helpful.

Line 89: Justin: Yes, that's true. Not helpful.

Line 90: Announcer: One minute remaining. Not helpful.

Line 91: Justin: That's also why I paused there because I was like, yeah, I'm good to go to a vote. Not helpful.

Line 92: Caitlynn: Yeah, me too. Not helpful.

Line 93: Justin: Okay. Mitchell? Mike? Not helpful.

Line 94: Mike: I'm there. Not helpful.

Line 95: Mitchell: I would be good too. Yeah. Not helpful.

Line 96: Mike: Yeah. Not helpful.

Line 97: Announcer: Time is up, everyone. Three. Not helpful.

The Insomniac looks at their card at end. The Mason can see if there's another Mason. The Hunter can kill someone else if voted out. The Tanner wants to die.
